plugin.name: MetaMask Identity
plugin.description: MetaMask and EIP-4361 Sign-In with Ethereum login and registration.
plugin.settings.title: %s - Plugin Settings
plugin.metamask.chain_id_help: The first release uses one EIP-155 Chain ID per site. Ethereum Mainnet is 1; local development chains commonly use 31337.
plugin.metamask.auto_register_help: This also requires public registration and external identity auto-registration in Site Settings.
plugin.metamask.ready: Configuration is complete. MetaMask is available at /login.
plugin.metamask.not_ready: Enable the provider, set a valid Chain ID, and configure a valid site URL to show it on the login page.
